prompt_text:
### Demographics: 79-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 12 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 2 (60-89)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent)
Simple Steatosis
Body mass index category: Overweight
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Diabetic Foot Ulcer / High-Risk Foot
Frailty with Mobility Impairment
Peptic ulcer disease (resolved)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 2 (60-89); HF (No); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent); MASLD: Simple Steatosis; BMI Category: Overweight
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (younger brother)
- Social history: Current smoker (15 cigarettes/day for 25 years; ~18.8 pack-years); Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Glimepiride 2mg once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 59.4 kg; Height 154.5 cm; BMI 24.9 kg/m²; Blood pressure 136/80 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.3%; 9 months ago 8.9%; 6 months ago 9.4%; 3 months ago 9.9%; current 9.9%), FPG (12 months ago 172mg/dL; 9 months ago 248mg/dL; 6 months ago 265mg/dL; 3 months ago 283mg/dL; current 235mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 57.3kg; 9 months ago 59.2kg; 6 months ago 59.3kg; 3 months ago 56.2kg; current 59.4kg), Height (12 months ago 154.5cm; 9 months ago 154.5cm; 6 months ago 154.5cm; 3 months ago 154.5cm; current 154.5cm), BMI (12 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 24.0kg/m²; current 24.9kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 131mmHg; 9 months ago 134mmHg; 6 months ago 136mmHg; 3 months ago 131mmHg; current 136mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 82mmHg; 9 months ago 80mmHg; 6 months ago 80mmHg; 3 months ago 80mmHg; current 80mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 39U/L; 9 months ago 49U/L; 6 months ago 46U/L; 3 months ago 46U/L; current 46U/L), AST (12 months ago 48U/L; 9 months ago 48U/L; 6 months ago 49U/L; 3 months ago 50U/L; current 47U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.3mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.3mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.3mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.2mg/dL; current 1.2mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 66mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 62mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 66mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 66mL/min/1.73m²; current 63mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 74mg/g; 9 months ago 57mg/g; 6 months ago 55mg/g; 3 months ago 79mg/g; current 71mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 81mg/dL; 9 months ago 75mg/dL; 6 months ago 82mg/dL; 3 months ago 81mg/dL; current 79mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 50mg/dL; 9 months ago 51mg/dL; 6 months ago 51mg/dL; 3 months ago 51mg/dL; current 49mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 133mg/dL; 9 months ago 113mg/dL; 6 months ago 129mg/dL; 3 months ago 131mg/dL; current 123mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 14.7g/dL; 9 months ago 15.2g/dL; 6 months ago 15.3g/dL; 3 months ago 14.8g/dL; current 14.9g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
